metadata.title: I Used Claude MCP to Make AI UGC Ads and Make Money in 2026
metadata.description:
🔗 Try Arcads: https://arcads.ai/?via=sandyleeai
🔗 Join Private Community: https://www.skool.com/sandyleeai
🔗 Free Resources: https://sleeautomation.com/resources

Want to make money online with AI UGC ads but don't know where to start? In this video, I walk you through the exact workflow I use to create AI-generated UGC ad videos using Arcads MCP + Claude no platform learning curve, no expensive creator fees. You'll see everything live from research to a finished video.

You'll learn how to use Claude as your script writer, actor selector, and video generator all in one place. I'll show you how to find real job opportunities for this skill, how to set up Arcads MCP in Claude, and how to go from a product brief to a publishable ad including a live walkthrough using a real hat brand as an example.

This is a skill with real earning potential. If you can prompt AI well and deliver results for brands, you can charge for it whether as a freelancer, agency owner, or in-house creative. Drop "meta" in the comments if you want to see how to connect this workflow directly to Facebook ads.

Timestamps:
0:00 Why AI video is the skill to learn in 2026
1:05 Where to find UGC ad jobs right now
2:42 Setting up Arcads + the product brief
3:05 Connecting Arcads MCP to Claude
7:05 Running market research with Claude
9:09 Writing the UGC script with Claude
11:15 Selecting a voice and generating an AI actor
14:16 Creating the video with Seedance 2.0
15:28 Reviewing the finished ad
16:30 How to connect Meta ads to Claude
